description: Fix 2 P0 tier-bypass violations: OpportunityFinder.tsx and CECreditDashboard.tsx both queried market_signals directly, bypassing useIntelligence() tier/isLive contract. Free-tier users could see paid-tier signals.

violations_fixed.violation: Raw useQuery + supabase.from('market_signals') — bypassed tier gating entirely
violations_fixed.fix: Replaced with useIntelligence({ limit: 100 }). Direction filter moved to client-side filteredSignals computation.

violations_fixed.violation: useTrendingSignals() hook called supabase.from('market_signals') directly — no tier gate, no isLive check
violations_fixed.fix: Replaced with useIntelligence({ limit: 6 }). direction='up' and magnitude sort applied client-side.
